query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "planbench-xl: evaluating long-horizon planning of llm tool-use agents " computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same core mechanism (long-horizon planning and decision alignment in LLM agents) and evaluates the same dependent variables (task success, reasoning coherence, and failure modes) that the user's question regarding "PlanBench-XL" and long-horizon planning seeks to extend. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and alternative evaluation framework for the specific domain of long-horizon LLM tool-use agents.
